name: OR-Tools Routing
summary: OR-Tools-backed TSP adapter using the routing solver with guided local search.
description: This adapter wraps Google OR-Tools for Rastion's public TSP hub. It is listed as experimental because it depends on an optional extra and introduces a larger external dependency surface than the built-in reference solvers.

capabilities.notes: Uses OR-Tools routing primitives for single-vehicle TSP only in Rastion v0.1.

limits.depot_assumptions: Assumes one depot and a single route manager.
limits.notes: Optional dependency. Build and eval flows must surface dependency-missing states clearly.

determinism: Deterministic for a fixed seed and time budget, subject to OR-Tools behavior.
known_failure_modes: Unavailable unless the ortools extra is installed.
The v0.1 adapter exposes TSP only, not broader routing variants.
